example.message: APIs V1 are ready to use.

post.summary: Sign in with email and password
post.description: Returns an access token and sets a refreshToken cookie.

get.description: Get list of vehicles. Normal users can only see their own vehicles. Staff/Admin can see all vehicles.

parameters.name: ownerId
parameters.description: Optional. Used by staff/admin to filter vehicles by owner.

post.description: Create a new vehicle for the current user. Staff/Admin can create vehicle for another user by providing ownerId.

get.description: Get detail of a vehicle by id.
Get list of active parking slots. Can filter by vehicleType and status.
Get list of available active parking slots. Can filter by vehicleType.
Get detail of a parking slot by id.
Get all reservations for the authenticated user, or all reservations for staff roles.

post.description: Create a new parking reservation for the authenticated user.

get.description: Get the details of a specific reservation.

put.description: Cancel an existing reservation by id.

get.description: Get all feedback entries for the authenticated user, or all feedback entries for staff roles.

post.description: Submit a new feedback entry for the authenticated user.

get.description: Get parking sessions for the authenticated user, or all sessions for staff roles.
Get details for a specific parking session.

post.summary: Check in to a parking session
post.description: Create a new active parking session for a vehicle at a slot.

post.summary: Check out of a parking session

message.example: User Nguyen Van A signed in successfully

ownerId.description: Optional. Staff/Admin can create vehicle for another user.
